calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Respondent/Plaintiff Brenda Perdue appeared in pro per.
Appellant/Defendant Roy Wadley appeared in pro per.
Defendant Hattie Wadley did not appear.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Brenda Perdue testified on her own behalf.
Appellant/Defendant Roy Wadley testified on his own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent/Plaintiff's Group Exhibit 1: Documents including Department of Building Inspection Complaint Data, DBI Notice of Violation, Email correspondence between the parties.
Appellant/Defendant's Group Exhibit A: Documents including Invoice from LCY Construction Inc., Chu Supply Invoice, Home Depot folder, and photographs of debris in house.

Respondent's and Appellant's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
